what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon showing a stacked database cylinder using an ellipse and two curved path segments.
observations: The SVG uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" with a 1.5 stroke width.
The root sets rounded line caps and joins for all strokes.
The top disk is an ellipse centered at 12,5 with radii 8 and 2.5.
Two path elements draw stacked database sections from y=5 to y=11 and y=11 to y=17.
The file contains no title, description, ids, classes, or embedded metadata.
standouts: Color inherits from current text or icon color through currentColor.
Geometry is expressed directly with primitive SVG elements.
conventions: Uses shared stroke styling on the root element instead of repeating it per shape.
Keeps the asset inline and dependency-free.
concerns: No intrinsic accessible title or description is present.
notes: This file is a reusable outline SVG icon for representing a stacked database or data storage concept.
questions: Should this SVG be decorative only, or should consuming code provide an accessible label?
purpose_vs_actual: The apparent purpose as a database-stack icon matches the visible stacked database cylinder graphic.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a compact, themeable database-stack symbol for interface use.
contribution: A small currentColor SVG database-stack pictogram that can be reused wherever a neutral data-storage icon is needed.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a stacked database cylinder with one ellipse and two curved stack paths.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for representing database or stored-data concepts in a themeable icon system.
